Fixed spawn-on-mention injection bug: offline agents weren't seeing their summoning kind:9 because #47 removed re-subscription logic. Added replay_channel_chat to re-apply narrow REQs when sessions go alive in already-covered channels; all tests now pass and branch is ready to merge.
